summary: Verified v1.0.1 Play Store monetization gating. All 8 review-request assertions PASS. MONETIZATION_ENABLED=false correctly hides every Stripe entry point: (a) Browse: UpsellBanner absent (no 'Become a Pro Worker'/'Get Background Checked'). (b) Profile: upgradeRow block absent, testIDs go-pro-cta and bg-check-cta both render 0 times, no '$4.99'/'$10 once' strings. (c) Post: boost section absent (no 'Boost this post', 'No boost', 'Post Job + Boost' text), submit button reads 'Post Job'; startCheckout guard on line 150 also confirmed via source review. (d) /upgrade deep-link renders 'Pro perks coming soon' screen — startCheckout is unreachable. (e) grep confirmed 'Demo mode' and 'purchases are mocked' strings are fully removed from /app/frontend. (f) Reviewer login works (googleplay.reviewer@quickgig.app). (g) All 4 screens load cleanly with no red-screen or unhandled promise rejections. Backend regression: 6/6 pytest cases pass — /api/billing/checkout still reachable (401 unauth, 200/valid auth path, 422 on bad package), /api/billing/catalog returns 200, /api/auth/me works for reviewer. Backend was NOT modified.

issues: Minor: iconCircle style has backgroundColor 'rgba(255,255,255,0.25)' (designed for gradient cards). On the new white 'Pro perks coming soon' screen, the circle plus its white-stroke Crown/ShieldCheck icons render nearly invisible against the white background, causing the icons to visually overlap the 'Pro Worker' / 'Background Check' labels. Not a Play Store blocker — text is readable — but consider giving the coming-soon variant a solid backgroundColor (e.g. colors.primary / colors.secondary) and dark icon strokes. Reference: /app/frontend/app/upgrade.tsx:55-80 + styles.iconCircle at line 339.

assertions_verified.browse_upsell_banner_hidden: PASS — no promo cards rendered; source line 285 wraps <UpsellBanner> in {MONETIZATION_ENABLED ? ... : null}
assertions_verified.profile_upgrade_row_hidden: PASS — testIDs go-pro-cta=0, bg-check-cta=0; no $4.99/$10 once text; source lines 255-292 wrap entire <View styles.upgradeRow>
assertions_verified.post_boost_section_hidden: PASS — no 'Boost this post', 'No boost', or BoostOption text; source line 327 wraps the whole boost block
assertions_verified.post_submit_button_text: PASS — reads 'Post Job' (line 371 checks MONETIZATION_ENABLED && boostPlan)
assertions_verified.post_submit_boost_logic_guarded: PASS — line 150 checks `if (MONETIZATION_ENABLED && boostPlan)` before startCheckout()
assertions_verified.upgrade_deeplink_shows_coming_soon: PASS — early-return at line 33 renders 'Pro perks coming soon'; startCheckout unreachable
assertions_verified.no_demo_mode_strings: PASS — grep for 'Demo mode' and 'purchases are mocked' across /app/frontend returned zero matches
assertions_verified.reviewer_login_and_navigation: PASS — login worked, Browse/Post/Profile/upgrade all rendered cleanly, no red screens, no pageerrors
assertions_verified.backend_billing_checkout_untouched: PASS — /api/billing/checkout returns 401 (unauth), valid 4xx/2xx with reviewer token, 422 on bad package_id; /api/billing/catalog 200

action_items: OPTIONAL / low priority: fix the invisible icon circles on the /upgrade coming-soon screen (see design_issues). Cosmetic only — will not affect Play Store review outcome.
Ready to ship v1.0.1 to Play Console. No monetization CTA is reachable in the shipped app; Google Play policy risk is mitigated.
critical_code_review_comments: Good architectural choice: single MONETIZATION_ENABLED flag in /app/frontend/src/features.ts keeps the gating logic centralized. Flipping to true after Play Billing integration will re-enable everything atomically.

post.tsx line 150 correctly guards startCheckout() at the imperative call site (not just the UI). This is the important belt-and-suspenders check — even if the boost UI accidentally leaks back later, no Stripe call fires unless the flag is true.
upgrade.tsx uses an early-return at line 33 before ANY startCheckout binding is invoked, so deep-linking to /upgrade?focus=pro or /upgrade?focus=bg from any lingering internal link is also safe.
Backend /api/billing/* endpoints remain unchanged and functional, which preserves the web/iOS TestFlight path and the eventual Play Billing bridge.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MONETIZATION_ENABLED is a compile-time constant flip in /app/frontend/src/features.ts. If future iterations re-enable it (v1.1 with Play Billing), ensure ALL FIVE guarded sites flip together: browse.tsx:285, profile.tsx:255, post.tsx:150 (imperative), post.tsx:327 (UI), post.tsx:371 (button label), upgrade.tsx:33 (early return). Search: `grep -rn MONETIZATION_ENABLED /app/frontend`.
rca_of_issue: Not a bug fix — this iteration validates a policy-compliance change. Google Play blocks digital IAP via Stripe; the app must not surface any Stripe entry point in the shipping build. All six code sites were correctly guarded, and the pre-existing 'Demo mode — purchases are mocked' banner (deceptive-behavior rejection risk) has been fully removed from the frontend tree.
